title: Axiom Buttons for Servers
description: This is a minecraft Fabric mod which should show buttons to open Axioms color picker screen and the gradient screen even on server where there is no axiom installed
body: This is a minecraft Fabric mod which should show buttons to open Axioms blockcolorpickerscreen and gradientscreen from the inventory even on server where there is no axiom installed. You can also change if they are only rendered on multiplayer servers or only on singleplayer. (Not sure why you want to see them in singleplayer though)
